request.description:
Authenticate user.

Error responses:
- 400: Invalid request body / Validation Error (missing email, invalid email format, missing password, password too short)
- 401: Incorrect password
- 403: Account is inactive, please contact administrator
- 404: Email not registered
- 500: Failed to generate authentication token / unexpected error

Refresh access token using refresh_token cookie.

Error responses:
- 401: Session expired, please login again / Refresh token is invalid or expired
- 500: Failed to refresh session

body.raw:
{
  "company_name": "PT Contoh Jaya",
  "company_address": "Jl. Sudirman No. 1, Jakarta",
  "admin_name": "John Doe",
  "admin_email": "admin@ptcontoh.com",
  "password": "password123"
}

request.description:
Register new company and admin account. Default plan: FREE.

Error responses:
- 400: Invalid request body / Validation Error (missing company_name, admin_name, admin_email, password, invalid email format, password too short)
- 409: Email is already registered, please use a different email
- 500: Registration failed, please try again later

Create a new employee. Subject to subscription quota (MaxEmployees).

Error responses:
- 400: Invalid request body / Validation error
- 403: Employee limit reached (5/5). Please upgrade your subscription plan to add more employees.
- 500: Internal server error

Create a new client. Subject to subscription quota (MaxClients).

Error responses:
- 400: Invalid request body / Validation error
- 403: Client limit reached (3/3). Please upgrade your subscription plan to add more clients.
- 500: Internal server error

Create a new manpower request. Subject to subscription quota (MaxManpowerRequests).

Error responses:
- 400: Invalid request body / Validation error
- 403: Manpower request limit reached (5/5). Please upgrade your subscription plan to add more manpower requests.
- 500: Internal server error

query.description: draft | sent | accepted | rejected | withdrawn | expired
